overall.description: Static panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape featuring a river with floating shanty structures, a distinctive red bridge, and dense futuristic skyscrapers under clear afternoon skies. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting Night City with cinematic lighting and detailed urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront cityscape with floating shanty village and cyberpunk skyline

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cityscape from a fixed elevated vantage point overlooking the river

entered.detail: distinctive red-orange bridge spanning the river with multiple support pillars
dark reflective water surface occupying the foreground with gentle ripples
cluster of makeshift structures and boats built on the river surface
dense cluster of cyberpunk skyscrapers with varied heights and neon accents
tall chimneys emitting white smoke plumes into the clear sky
large digital screen partially visible on the left edge displaying colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a futuristic cyberpunk waterfront city. The foreground features a murky river with floating shanty structures, while a prominent red arch bridge spans across the middle ground. The background is dominated by a dense futuristic skyline of glass and steel skyscrapers with industrial smokestacks visible on the right, all bathed in warm afternoon sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static cinematic vista of a futuristic cyberpunk waterfront that emphasizes the contrast between urban decay and towering corporate architecture. It begins with a focus on the murky river in the foreground, where floating shanty structures drift beneath a clear afternoon sky. The view then extends across the middle ground to a prominent red arch bridge that spans the waterway. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal a dense skyline of glass and steel skyscrapers, with industrial smokestacks rising on the right side of the frame.
